recommendations.title: Action Point
recommendations.overview: A daredevil designs and operates his own theme park with his friends.

recommendations.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog

recommendations.title: My Bodyguard

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: Jurassic Park

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: The Client

recommendations.title: Austenland
recommendations.overview: Obsessed with the BBC production of "Pride and Prejudice", a woman travels to a Jane Austen theme park in search for her perfect gentleman.

recommendations.title: Free Willy

recommendations.title: The Hoax
recommendations.overview: In what would cause a fantastic media frenzy, Clifford Irving sells his bogus biography of Howard Hughes to a premiere publishing house in the early 1970s.
